## Describe your changes

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. 
Also, verify that you are following our workflow rule: **Only one batched PR per day!**

## Checklist before requesting a review
- [ ] I have verified these changes locally.
- [ ] I have squashed or batched my day's work into this single PR to keep the commit history clean.
- [ ] My code respects the AST-first design philosophy (no fragile RegEx for parsing markdown).
- [ ] I have tested edge cases (e.g., hard breaks, code blocks, nested lists).
